note_text: Client called to ask about the recent market dip in emerging markets. Reassured her the portfolio is aligned with long-term strategy. No changes requested.
Annual review completed. Anna is happy with performance and plans to increase monthly deposit to 350 EUR next quarter.
Markus inquired about bond allocation. Explained the conservative weighting rationale. Client satisfied with current approach.
Sophie flagged concern about YTD performance. Sent reassurance email and scheduled a follow-up call for next week.
Thomas confirmed house purchase timeline is still 3–5 years away. Recommended maintaining current balanced allocation.
Wolfgang requested a pension projection report. Sent PDF summary. No portfolio changes required.
Katharina has been logging in frequently. Called proactively. She was anxious about news coverage of tech stocks. Calmed concerns and reminded of long-term strategy.
Peter asked about adding a second goal (travel fund). Explained we focus on single long-term goals. He will reconsider.
Maria reviewed annual statement. Satisfied with conservative approach. No changes.
Eva concerned about recent negative performance. Sent market context email. Flagged for follow-up if logins continue to increase.
Gerald's aggressive profile showing significant drawdown. Proactively reached out via phone but no answer. Left voicemail.
Oliver has highest login count this week and worst performance. Support ticket raised for urgent callback.
Renate has not logged in since December. Two missed deposits flagged. Sent reactivation email. No response yet.
Bernhard inactive for several months. Phone call attempt unanswered. Second attempt scheduled.
Veronika researching house purchase timelines. Confirmed 3-year horizon. Portfolio is on track.
